title: Can a Gal Be Kind to Otaku?
overview: An awkward otaku is surprised to find himself becoming friends with two of the most popular girls at school.

title: Is My Room a Hangout Spot for Gals?!
overview: Ijichi and Amane insist on visiting Seo's house after school for an impromptu Glittery Monpets viewing party.

title: Do You Want to Come Over?
overview: Quiet otaku Takuya suddenly befriends two very different gals, bonding with them over anime and fandom.

title: Let's Go to Karaoke
overview: After an intense sports day at school, the gals take Seo out for an afternoon of Glittermon songs at karaoke.
